zh.lifeSummary: Isabell於1380年出生在英國。她於1402年與Thomas Knollys在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1461年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Isabell was born in 1380, in England. She married Thomas Knollys in 1402, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1461, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabell est née en 1380, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Thomas Knollys en 1402, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1461, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabellは1380年にイギリスで生まれた。1402年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでThomas Knollysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1461年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabell(은)는 1380년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Thomas Knollys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabell родилась в 1380 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Knollys в 1402 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1461 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
